dsl_rule.translation_notes: Classic SMA crossover strategy. Direction is context-dependent: long when short-term SMA exceeds long-term SMA, short otherwise. Uses sma_20 and sma_100 per signal parameters. Exit conditions are reversals of entry conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Classic SMA crossover strategy. Direction is context-dependent: long when short-term SMA exceeds long-term SMA, short otherwise. Uses sma_20 and sma_100 per signal parameters. Exit conditions are reversals of entry conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should hold a long position when short-term moving average exceeds long-term moving average, and hold a short position otherwise, using optimized lookback periods for both averages.
